gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 Ti with Max-Q Design
notes: Game works perfectly except for a slight issue. The game is running at ludicrous speeds. You can beat some levels by swinging your mouse left and right hoping to complete a level within half a second
title: Marble Mayhem: Fragile Ball

notes: With updated Proton it runs out of the box. 60 FPS cap so I couldn't test performance but it stays there all the time. Recommended to Enable V-sync in game to prevent tearing (also happens on Windows)
title: Marble Mayhem: Fragile Ball
